title: medicago orbicularis subsp. marginata
intro: Medicago orbicularis subsp. marginata, also known as a type of wild lucerne or hop clover, is a perennial legume plant native to the Mediterranean region. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a natural anti-inflammatory and antioxidant, which can help to soothe digestive issues and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Medicago orbicularis subsp. marginata include reducing symptoms of menopause, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and infusions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its full potential.
